steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Parallel lines have equal slopes. Rewrite line $j$: $4x + 5y = 55 \Rightarrow$ slope $= -4/5$. Line $k$: $24x + ry = 15 \Rightarrow$ slope $= -24/r$. Set slopes equal: $-24/r = -4/5$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $-24/r = -4/5 \Rightarrow 4r = 120 \Rightarrow r = 30$. Substitute back: $24x + 30y = 15$. At $x = 0$: $30y = 15 \Rightarrow y = 1/2$. So $b = 1/2$.
